# spec.md Template

```markdown
# Specification: <concise title>
## Goals
Observable outcomes (not implementation steps).
## Out of Scope
Specific items this session will NOT address.
## Acceptance Criteria
Numbered, testable, each with its AC-N id.
## Definition of Done
All ACs pass; no regressions; merged.
## Constraints
Non-negotiable hard limits.
## Assumptions
Flag decisions made without explicit guidance.
```
